title: Animated Sculk Totem
description: Animated Sculk Totem is a texture pack that gives a Sculk effect to the Totem of Undying and adds animation to the eyes.
body:
This texture pack adds an animation to the eyes of the Totem of Undying and adds a Sculk texture to it.

_PS: This texture pack should normally work for all versions of the game from 1.21_
